title: OS-V1 Core Architecture Verification
decision: Reframed and authorized for diagnostic-only execution. Proceed to perform read-only OS-V1 core architecture verification and generate the report; no system modifications permitted.
operator_notes: Term 'Codex' is deprecated and has been reinterpreted per OS-V1 directives. Apprentice must operate in read-only mode; only authorized write is the generation of a diagnostic report file. Escalate to Architect for any required changes or refactors.
revised_instructions: Execute a read-only architectural verification of OS-V1 core per Librarian directive. Do not modify any code, configs, or system state. Generate a single markdown report at C:\ai.ass\verification-logs\os-v1-arch-verify-report-template-001.md documenting findings and recommendations for Architect review.

body.summary: Reinterpret deprecated 'Codex' task to OS-V1 Core Architecture Verification. Perform a comprehensive read-only scan of C:\ai.ass\OS-V1\, verify naming policy compliance (executor- prefix), detect deprecated 'Codex' references, identify modules and interdependencies, find orphans/inconsistencies, and output a structured markdown report. No system modifications allowed; report generation only.
body.full_context: Handoff context: 1) 'Codex' is deprecated; refactor references conceptually to OS-V1 Core. 2) execution_allowed=false: Apprentice (Qwen-7B) must operate read-only; no system state/config changes. 3) Naming policy: active scripts must use 'executor-' prefix. 4) Mirror System: C:\ai.ass\mirror\tasks.json is the local proxy for task/state. 5) Write mode: Cloud models are read-only; Apprentice may only write via executor- scripts when authorized. For this task, writing the verification report is authorized as diagnostic output.
body.proposed_action: Run a diagnostic-only workflow: 1) Confirm environment and constraints. 2) Recursively list C:\ai.ass\OS-V1\; read C:\ai.ass\mirror\tasks.json; identify executor- scripts and relevant configs; read their contents. 3) Analyze for deprecated 'Codex' references; verify naming policy; identify modules, interdependencies, orphans, and inconsistencies. 4) Generate markdown report at C:\ai.ass\verification-logs\os-v1-arch-verify-report-template-001.md with structured sections (findings, deprecated refs, naming compliance, modules/interdeps, observations, recommendations). 5) Prepare learning loop record for apprentice journal (read-only planning; logging to be performed only when explicitly authorized).
body.why_this_was_triggered: The task is a template placeholder using deprecated 'Codex' terminology. It requires reinterpretation under OS-V1 policies and a read-only verification to map the current core architecture and detect legacy artifacts.
body.risk_assessment: Low. All actions are read-only except for creating a single diagnostic report file. No code/config/system state changes. Primary risks are incomplete coverage or false positives; mitigated by explicit documentation in the report.
body.affected_components:
- Directory: C:\ai.ass\OS-V1\ (all subfolders/files)
- Mirror: C:\ai.ass\mirror\tasks.json (read-only)
- Output: C:\ai.ass\verification-logs\os-v1-arch-verify-report-template-001.md (report file)
body.operator_notes: Before proceeding, confirm: working directory is C:\ai.ass; project is OS-V1; task is diagnostic-only. Do not rename, move, or edit any files. If any operation would change system state, stop and request Architect approval.
body.revised_instructions:
Phase 1: Environment & Task Confirmation
1) Confirm working directory: C:\ai.ass
2) Acknowledge project_id: OS-V1
3) Confirm execution_allowed=false implies no system modifications
4) Confirm 'Codex' deprecated; reinterpret to OS-V1 Core

Phase 2: Information Retrieval (READ-ONLY)
1) Recursively list C:\ai.ass\OS-V1\
2) Read C:\ai.ass\mirror\tasks.json
3) Identify files with 'executor-' prefix in OS-V1
4) Read contents of identified executor- scripts and relevant configs (.json/.yaml/.config, etc.)

Phase 3: Architectural Analysis & Compliance Check
1) Scan for 'Codex' references; record file path, line, context
2) Verify naming policy: list compliant executor- scripts; list potential active scripts without prefix
3) Identify OS-V1 modules/subsystems from content analysis
4) Map interdependencies and data flow among modules and executor- scripts
5) Detect orphaned components not referenced by executors or core configs
6) Note structural inconsistencies, unclear responsibilities, or gaps

Phase 4: Report Generation (AUTHORIZED WRITE)
Create C:\ai.ass\verification-logs\os-v1-arch-verify-report-template-001.md including:
- Header: Task ID (template-001), Effective Title (OS-V1 Core Architecture Verification), Project (OS-V1), Date
- Summary of Findings
- Deprecated 'Codex' References (path, line, snippet) + refactor recommendations
- Naming Policy Compliance (executor-): compliant list; non-compliant candidates
- Identified Modules & Interdependencies: description and data flow
- Architectural Observations & Inconsistencies: issues and orphans
- Recommendations: actions for Architect review (no changes to be performed by Apprentice)

Phase 5: Learning Loop Record
Prepare hypothesis, directive, and lesson delta for learning/apprentice-journal-v1.jsonl; only write when explicitly authorized.
